title: poa keysseri var. brassii
intro: Poa keysseri var. brassii, also known as Keysser's blue grass or mountain blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve congestion and soothe the respiratory system, providing health benefits such as improved breathing and reduced inflammation. Poa keysseri var. brassii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief from respiratory issues.
